Sec. 1  
Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a major city in Nigeria, known for its economic growth and cultural diversity. It is one of the most developed cities in the country and serves as a hub for business and education. The city is also home to several important institutions, including the University of Lagos and the Nigerian Institute of Science and Technology. Lekki is a place where people from different backgrounds come together to contribute to the development of the nation.
